blocks.text: Barça vs Atlético: La Liga's title race reaches its defining moment

Friday night delivers a genuine title six-pointer: Barcelona (73pts) host Atlético Madrid (57pts) at the Metropolitano. Four points separate them — a Madrid win keeps the chase alive, a Barça victory could seal the title race early.
⚽ Barcelona at Atlético Madrid — La Liga title decider at the Metropolitano
⛳ Valero Texas Open — Kristoffer Ventura and Kristoffer Reitan tee off in Masters warm-up at TPC San Antonio
